info.title: Operations Center — Machine Hours of Operation API
info.description:
Returns **durations** for which a machine’s **engine** was **on** or **off** during a **time range**, plus the **last known engine state** for the query context. Each value typically includes **`startDate`** / **`endDate`**, **`engineState`**, optional **`detailedState`**, and a **`machine`** link. Responses use the **CollectionPage** pattern (`total`, `links`, `values`).

**Terminal powered off:** When the **terminal** is powered off, hours of operation are **not** recorded.

**Media type:** Use **`Accept: application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`**.

**eTags:** This endpoint **does not** support John Deere’s **`x-deere-signature`** / eTag optimization.

tags.name: Hours of operation
tags.description: Engine on/off duration segments and detailed utilization states for a machine principal id.

OAuth2AuthorizationCode.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 (authorization code) for John Deere Precision Tech platform APIs. This endpoint requires **`eq1`**. Request `offline_access` if you need refresh tokens. Discover endpoints from the well-known URL.

scopes.eq1: Equipment Access Level 1 — view equipment and hours of operation

Link.description: Hypermedia link (`@type` **Link** when present). Items include **`machine`** and the collection may include **`self`**.

HoursOfOperationSegment.description: A time-bounded segment describing engine state and optional detailed utilization state. **`engineState`** uses the platform engine-state codes (see product documentation for full semantics).

links.description: Typically includes a **`machine`** link for the principal.

engineState.description: Engine / power-on key state: `0` — power-on key **OFF**; `1` — power-on key **ON**; `2` — terminal **SLEEPING**; `3` — terminal **HIBERNATING**.

detailedState.description: User-queried **detailedState** dimension when applicable (for example PTO or actuator utilization labels).

HoursOfOperationCollectionPage.description: Paged collection of hours-of-operation segments (**CollectionPage** pattern).

total.description: Count of values in this response or available for the query (see product behavior for pagination).

links.description: May include **`self`** and pagination links when applicable.

values.description: Duration segments for the requested range and filters.

get.description:
Returns **durations** for which the engine was **on** or **off** during a **specified period**, and supports viewing the **last known** engine state in the result set. Each request returns **`links`** including a **`machine`** link for the specified machine.

**Note:** When the **terminal** is powered off, hours of operation are **not** recorded.

**Please note:** This API **does not** support eTags.

**OAuth scope:** `eq1`

**Request URL:** `GET https://sandboxapi.deere.com/platform/machines/{principalId}/hoursOfOperation`

parameters.name: principalId
parameters.description: **Principal id** of the machine or equipment whose hours of operation you are reading.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: Organization id of the machine/equipment when you need to scope the request to a specific organization context.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filters hours of operation **starting from** this instant. Use a **UTC** timestamp.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filters hours of operation **before** this instant. Use a **UTC** timestamp.

parameters.name: detailedState
parameters.description: Request **one** detailed state dimension at a time. Supported values include **RearPTOEngagement**, **GenericMachineUtilization**, **GenericEngineUtilization**, **RoadbuildingMachineState**, **AutonomyMachineState**, and **FrontWheelDriveActuatorState**.

parameters.name: summarizeDuration
parameters.description: Merge **EngagedStates** for **RearPTOEngagement** and **FWDActuatorState** when consecutive engaged states are closer than this duration (product-specific units; see developer documentation).

parameters.name: itemLimit
parameters.description: Page size for **CollectionPage** responses: multiples of **10**, maximum **100**, when supported.

parameters.name: pageOffset
parameters.description: Zero-based offset aligned with **`itemLimit`** for paginated collections.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: Use **`application/vnd.deere.axiom.v3+json`** for Axiom v3 JSON responses.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token, expired access token, or application not licensed for the API.

403.description: Forbidden — user or client cannot access this machine or required OAuth scopes (ensure **`eq1`**) are not granted. May also indicate organization connection or terms (RCA) issues; check **X-Deere-Warning** / **X-Deere-Terms-Location** when present.

404.description: Not found — **`principalId`** is not valid for the caller’s accessible resources.

429.description: Too many requests — honor **Retry-After** when returned.

503.description: Service unavailable — retry with backoff; honor **Retry-After** when returned.
